arts.ttl: Borussia Dortmund push to sign Man Utd forward Rashford
arts.sum: Borussia Dortmund are now pushing to sign Manchester United forward Marcus Rashford, according to Sky Germany.

arts.ttl: Why Harry Maguire doesn't start for Manchester United vs Southampton
arts.sum: Man United head coach Ruben Amorim has made three changes to his starting line-up for Thursday night's Premier League clash with Southampton.

arts.ttl: Man Utd's Marcus Rashford defends himself against tabloid hit piece
arts.sum: Manchester United forward Marcus Rashford took to social media to pre-emptively defend himself against a tabloid hit piece.

arts.ttl: Manchester United star Marcus Rashford issues statement amid impending 'tabloid story'
arts.sum: "I have never seen this photo, I do not know this person, and I am not friends with him."

arts.ttl: LIVE: Man United face bottom-side Southampton
arts.sum: Follow all the updates from Old Trafford.

arts.ttl: Europa League club set to appoint Ole Gunnar Solskjær – First job after Manchester United
arts.sum: Ole Gunnar Solskjær hasn’t had a managerial job since being in charge of Manchester United. That’s not down to a lack of offers for the Norwegian, with there being interest from multiple clubs and also national teams in recent months. Still, Solskjær hasn’t found anything that could convince him to return to management after Manchester The post Europa League club set to appoint Ole Gunnar Solskjær – First job after Manchester United appeared first on Sport Witness.

arts.ttl: Thousands of ticketless Rangers supporters to attend 'Fanzone' near Old Trafford for Man United clash - 17 years after their fans rioted in Manchester during UEFA Cup final defeat
arts.sum: EXCLUSIVE BY MIKE KEEGAN: A giant exhibition centre, just two miles from Old Trafford, is hosting a 'Rangers Takeover' when the Glasgow side take on Man United next Thursday.

arts.ttl: Team News: Garnacho, Rashford decisions made as Man United confirm XI for Southampton clash
arts.sum: Manchester United head coach Ruben Amorim confirms his starting XI for Thursday's Premier League clash with Southampton at Old Trafford.

arts.ttl: Man United get Luke Shaw replacement update as Alphonso Davies 'agreement reached'
arts.sum: Manchester United have been long-term admirers of Alphonso Davies, whose future in Germany was in doubt

arts.ttl: Manchester United v Southampton: Premier League – live
arts.sum: Premier League updates from the 8pm GMT kick-off Live scores | Read Football Daily | Top scorers | Mail Scott Manchester United have lost their last three games at home: 2-3 v Nottingham Forest, 0-3 v Bournemouth and 0-2 v Newcastle United. If they lose tonight to extend that run to four, it’ll be their worst league sequence at Old Trafford in the top flight since 1930, when they lost the final game of the 1929-30 season 1-5 v Sheffield Wednesday, then started their 1930-31 home campaign thus … 3-4 v Aston Villa 0-6 v Huddersfield Town 4-7 v Newcastle United 0-2 v Grimsby Town 1-2 v Arsenal Continue reading...
